title: Property Consultant - PropTiger - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - PropTiger - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
PropTiger has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About PropTiger:
PropTiger is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropTiger!
